name: Ham-Broccoli Rolls
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen broccoli spears, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, place ham slices.
Top each ham slice with cheese.
2. Place cooked broccoli spears on top of each cheese-topped-ham slice. Set aside.
3. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt 1 tablespoon butter, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
4. Blend in the flour, salt, horseradish, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and onion. Set aside.
5. Combine beaten egg yolks and pineapple juice.
6. Add the pineapple juice mixture to the butter mixture. Blend well.
7. Stir in milk.
8. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes, stirring every minute until the sauce is thick and bubbling.
9. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of sauce over broccoli.
10. Roll ham and cheese around broccoli and secure with wooden toothpicks.
11. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 8 minutes.
12. Spoon remaining sauce over ham rolls. Top with pineapple slices.
13. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 to 3 minutes or until the sauce is bubbly.
